Uses of Interface
com.github.sttk.errs.ErrHandler

  • Uses of ErrHandler in com.github.sttk.errs

    Methods in com.github.sttk.errs with parameters of type ErrHandler
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static void
    Err.addAsyncHandler(ErrHandler handler)
    Adds an ErrHandler object which is executed asynchronously just after an Err is created.
    static void
    Err.addSyncHandler(ErrHandler handler)
    Adds an ErrHandler object which is executed synchronously just after an Err is created.
